go_runtime_scope: local/copied-DB-and-files attachments metadata list/upload/delete parity candidate only

update_route_boundary.PUT /api/attachments/<id>: not a current Python API route
update_route_boundary.PATCH /api/attachments/<id>: not a current Python API route
update_route_boundary.decision: do not add a Go-only attachment metadata update route during T019

parity_scope: list attachments for an existing note ordered by created_at DESC
missing note returns Python-compatible 404 before multipart file validation
multipart upload requires a file field and a non-empty filename
allowed attachment extensions stay md, txt, and markdown
unsupported extension returns a deterministic Python-compatible validation message
successful upload writes docs/attachments, stores file_path, file_type, title, size_bytes, is_auto_extracted=0, and returns Python-compatible JSON shape
delete removes the DB row and deletes the copied attachment file when present
delete succeeds and removes the DB row when the copied attachment file is already missing
default Go runtime keeps attachment metadata writes disabled
retained_python_scope: PUT/PATCH attachment metadata update because no current Python route exists

allowed_next_step.reason: Attachment metadata upload/delete is closed as a local/copied-DB-and-files candidate; the next file surface is raw/text/binary serving behavior, including raw branch and MIME/download boundaries.
